### Validation

- [ ] Image exists in Amazon ECR
- [ ] Image tag is immutable and begins with `sha-`
- [ ] Helm chart renders successfully
- [ ] Security scans passed
- [ ] Rollback commit or previous image tag is known
- [ ] No plaintext secrets are included
